name: context-graph
description: Capture Codex runtime activity through Agent Context Graph hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Send Codex lifecycle events to Agent Context Graph.
interface.longDescription: Installs Codex lifecycle hooks that call the Agent Context Graph hook CLI, allowing graph connectors such as Skills Graph to persist useful runtime context in Memgraph.
defaultPrompt: Check whether context graph hooks are installed.
Explain what Codex events are captured.
Show recent skill usage in Memgraph.
